goal: Move the existing Thursday 2pm appointment to a later day.
success_criteria: The agent locates/acknowledges the existing appointment and confirms a new time, or explains how to reschedule.

lines.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.
Para Español, oprima el 2. Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Maria?
No, this is David Kim calling. I actually have an appointment this Thursday at 2pm, but I need to reschedule it.
Please provide the full name and date of birth of the patient who needs to reschedule the appointment.
Sure, it's David Kim, and my date of birth is July 12th, 1985.
Just to confirm, I have your name as David Kim, and your date of birth is July 12, 1985. Is that correct?
Would you like me to look up your record using the phone number you have on file with us? If so, please tell me that number.
I can give you the phone number. It's 555-213-7790.
If you're not sure I can confirm your name and date of birth again, just let me know what you prefer.

I have your phone number as 555-213-7790, and your date of birth is July 12, 1985. Is that correct? I can't help with rescheduling right now, but I can connect you to our patient support team for help. Please stay on the line while I transfer your call. Connecting you to a representative. Please wait.
Hello, you've reached the Pretty Good AI test line. Goodbye.
Oh, okay. Well, thanks anyway. Goodbye.
